description: SHA-anchored evidence chain for assurance claim verdicts (A-001..A-008)

records.claim_summary: Secret-bearing signing routes through CPU CT layer
records.verification_method: LLVM ct-verif compile-time analysis + Valgrind MAKE_MEM_UNDEFINED taint + dudect statistical test
records.scope_note: CPU x86-64 and ARM64 only; GPU paths not covered by hardware power analysis

records.claim_summary: Stable GPU C ABI exposes 19 backend-neutral batch operations
records.verification_method: Local GPU CI only (no GitHub CI GPU runners by design)
records.scope_note: GPU tests are local-CI only — correct by design; GitHub CI runners have no GPU

records.claim_summary: CUDA, OpenCL, and Metal implement the stable GPU C ABI surface
records.verification_method: Local GPU CI backend matrix tests
records.scope_note: GPU only; ROCm/HIP is early-development with no hardware validation

records.claim_summary: Benchmark numbers tied to documented harnesses and reproducible artifacts
records.verification_method: bench_unified harness with DoNotOptimize, rotating inputs, GCC 14.2.0, x86-64
records.scope_note: JSON artifact contains median only; min/max/stddev fields pending schema update

records.claim_summary: Exploit-style PoC tests are core assurance; unified runner passes all blocking modules
records.verification_method: CAAS Stage 0-3 gates; check_exploit_wiring.py; unified_audit_runner --section exploit_poc

records.claim_summary: Source graph is maintained and used as part of the audit workflow
records.verification_method: Source graph rebuild on every CI run; quality gate checks coverage
records.scope_note: Graph covers CPU sources; GPU shaders are advisory coverage

records.claim_summary: Claims backed by rerunnable artifacts with documented reproduction steps
records.verification_method: Replay capsule SHA256 verified by gate.yml bundle_verify step
records.scope_note: --allow-commit-mismatch flag in bundle_verify allows capsule to lag HEAD by one release cycle

records.claim_summary: ROCm/HIP backend is early-development; no hardware-validated CI exists
records.verification_method: Source code review only; no hardware CI runner available
records.scope_note: Correctly disclosed as early-development in all docs; no false claims of hardware validation
